description:
Import the dense point cloud from C:\workspace\data\drone_dense_points.csv into TopoCal. Filter the dataset to enforce a minimum spatial distance of 2.5 meters between points. Export the resulting thinned dataset to C:\workspace\data\thinned_points.csv and save the TopoCal project to C:\workspace\data\optimized_survey.top. Generate a report at C:\workspace\data\filter_report.txt containing the original and final point counts using the following format:
Original_Count: [number]
Final_Count: [number]
